prompt:
Scene: A vast impossible mirror room that combines three eras in one continuous photorealistic space: a Victorian parlor on the left, a near-future neon apartment in the center, and a sandstone desert observatory at dawn on the right. The rooms blend through large standing mirrors and matching floor lines, like one timeline folding into itself.

Subject: One fictional woman named Elena appears three times in the same image at different ages: age 12 on the left sketching beside an antique chair, age 32 in the center standing calmly and looking at camera, age 72 on the right seated beside a telescope. All three versions must share the same almond-shaped eyes, straight nose, small beauty mark under the left eye, black wavy hair aging naturally, and emerald velvet clothing motif. The adult Elena is the anchor subject in the center, full body, about 50% frame height.

Important details: Photorealistic cinematic editorial image, 35mm lens, extremely careful identity consistency across ages, controlled warm lamp light from the Victorian side, neon cyan-magenta spill in the center, pale sunrise light from the observatory side. Rich but restrained palette: emerald, amber, cyan, sandstone. Realistic mirror reflections, coherent perspective, detailed hands and faces, no text anywhere.

Use case: Single-image GPT Image 2 Hub showcase for one-shot identity consistency, time-split composition, and high-concept narrative. 16:9 crop-safe, clear enough for gallery thumbnail and impressive in detail view.

Constraints: No text, no logos, no watermark, no extra people, no anime style, no fantasy glow, no duplicated limbs, no malformed hands, no face drift. The three figures must read as the same person across life stages, not three unrelated people. Preserve exact 16:9 aspect ratio.
title: Timeline Collision Hero
description: A single wide image where Victorian, neon, and observatory timelines meet in one mirror room.

generation.runner_notes: No reference image required. Queue can run this image directly from prompt.

en.title: Timeline Collision Hero
en.description: A single wide image where Victorian, neon, and observatory timelines meet in one mirror room.

zh-CN.title: 时间线碰撞主视觉
zh-CN.description: 一张宽幅单图，维多利亚、霓虹和天文台三条时间线在同一个镜厅中相遇。

alt.en: Three life stages of the same woman meet in one folded mirror-room timeline.
alt.zh-CN: 同一位女性的三个人生阶段在折叠镜厅时间线中相遇。
